title: Multiple tab dashboards
excerpt:
Be able to add multiple tabs to a dashboard, meaning you can pull boards into one area (a dashboard) but split across multiple tabs. Saves dipping in and out of different areas.

posts.author: beck_rowaichi (Beck Rowaichi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Be able to add multiple tabs to a dashboard, meaning you can pull boards into one area (a dashboard) but split across multiple tabs. Saves dipping in and out of different areas.
UX feature, but a useful and simple one to roll out potentially.
Eg instead of having the tables for finance, legal and design in the first dashboard tab which is pretty clunky. I would have the summary and metrics on the first dashboard tab and the tables from each department (the info sitting behind the dashboard metrics on tab 1) sitting on the other separate dashboard tabs. Clean, clear and smooth UX.

posts.author: TylerJohnson (Tyler Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree this would be a nice improvement! I’d love to have the ability to create a Dashboard, but instead of jamming everything in on a single board, create different tabs in the Dashboard (similar to how you can create different views in a single board).

posts.author: NStablein (Nick  Stablein)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love this. So many use cases. This seems simple and would be a game changer for me.
